SenderRESTErrorHandling.description: Determine if REST error handling exists

SenderRESTOperationDetermination.description: Determine if any HTTP method determination is used

SenderFileOSCommand.description: Determine if OS command is used

OMParameterType.description: Identify the Category of the Parameter used in Operation Mapping (Simple Type or Adapter)
